title: Create: Biomimicry
description: The act of copying animals to improve your circumstances.
body: ### Welcome to Create: Biomimicry! This mods adds a bunch of items needed to turn non-animal products into "animal products", so u dont have to murder those poor animals any more (u still can, it is a game after all xD) FAQ: Can I use this in my modpack? Of course, go ham! Well, not ham, but this mod's equivalent :) Can I post this on ANY other website? NO. This mod is currently on all appropriate websites, so nothing more, nothing less
